components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #3b82f6; color: #000; padding: 12px 24px; font-weight: 700; border: none; border-radius: 12px; transition: opacity 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Intimate Card
components.css: .ds-card { background: #0a0a0a; border: 1px solid #262626; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { color: #fff; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-weight: 700; } .ds-card-body { color: #a3a3a3; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Legacy Calendar is an uncompromisingly dark, high-utility tool designed for intimate friend groups. It rejects generic SaaS aesthetics for a deep-night, high-contrast palette optimized for OLED displays.

rules.name: The Void Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds must be absolute #000000. Lighter dark mode grays are prohibited for root surfaces.

rules.name: The Border-First Rule
rules.body: Depth is primarily conveyed via subtle #262626 borders.

dos: Do use absolute #000000 for the page background.
Do use rounded-2xl for large overlays.
Do maintain high contrast ratios (minimum 7:1) for primary text.
donts: Don't use Light Mode. No blinding whites.
Don't use thick colored borders as accents.
